creative_brief: Hero image: close-up of a farmer's weathered hands passing a crate of produce directly to a young parent's hands — no counter, no checkout, no middleman. Warm natural light. Below the fold, use clean white space with a single accent colour (FarmThru green) to let the investment thesis breathe. Photography over illustration. Real faces over stock.
headline: You believe food can be fairer. Now you can own the proof.
subhead: FarmThru is building a farm-direct grocery store that pays farmers first and feeds families real food. Our equity crowdfunding campaign lets you become a co-owner — not just a customer.
hero_copy: You've watched supermarkets squeeze farmers for decades. You've read the labels, doubted the claims, switched brands hoping something would change. Nothing did. Because the system wasn't built for you or the people growing your food. FarmThru is a different system — farm-direct, hub-and-collect, no unnecessary middlemen. We're raising capital through equity crowdfunding on Birchal so everyday people can own a piece of the grocery store that pays farmers first. A $5 refundable deposit secures your VIP spot.

sections.heading: The investment thesis in one sentence
sections.body:
Australia's grocery market is worth $130B, and direct-to-consumer food is growing 24% year-on-year. Yet almost no one has built a scalable, farm-direct grocery brand that everyday families can actually afford. That's the gap FarmThru sits in.

Our model is simple: we partner with ~15-20 regenerative farms and suppliers across NSW. Customers order online, collect from our Brookvale hub Monday to Friday (or get delivery across Sydney, Central Coast, and Wollongong). No subscriptions. No lock-in. No membership fees. Bulk buying keeps prices honest.

The middlemen are gone. The margin they took now splits between fairer farmer payments and lower family prices. Values and money finally pointing the same direction.

sections.heading: Why this matters to you personally
sections.body:
Most investments ask you to bet on a spreadsheet. This one asks a different question: do you want to co-own the alternative you've been waiting for?

Every dollar in a supermarket reinforces a supply chain that moves food 2,400km before it reaches you. FarmThru cuts that to a fraction — straight from farm to hub. Same cut of meat, completely different impact on the farmer who raised it.

As a VIP investor, you get first access to the campaign, priority updates, and exclusive Q&A with the founding team. You're not watching from the sidelines. You're a partner in a grocery store that shows you exactly where your food comes from.

Minimum investment is $50. Maximum is $10,000 per investor. The $5 refundable VIP deposit holds your place with zero obligation.

sections.heading: What you're actually backing
sections.body:
A working hub in Brookvale, already collecting orders. Named farms across NSW, already supplying. A non-subscription model that lets families order when they want, save through bulk buying, and never get locked in.

This isn't a concept deck. It's a grocery store being built by people who got tired of the old system — for customers who feel the same way.

Vote for change with your wallet. Be part of it. Own a piece of it.

sections.heading: Honest risks, honestly stated
sections.body:
Equity crowdfunding is not a savings account. Your capital is at risk. Early-stage businesses can fail, and there's no guarantee of returns or liquidity. You may lose some or all of your investment.

FarmThru is pre-scale. Growth depends on customer adoption, supply chain execution, and market conditions we can't fully control. Read the offer document on Birchal carefully before committing any money.

We believe in this model deeply — but belief isn't a financial plan. Invest only what you can afford to lose.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This page may contain general information about a potential equity crowdfunding offer. It is not financial advice. Any investment involves risk, including the risk of losing your entire investment. Past performance is not indicative of future results. No returns are guaranteed. FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign will be hosted on Birchal. Please read the offer document and any risk disclosures in full before making an investment decision. The $5 VIP deposit is fully refundable. This content has been prepared by FarmThru Pty Ltd and has not been approved by any financial regulator.
